file_insights.purpose: Track completion of qemu adapter verification subtasks
file_insights.structure: Nested JSON with phase/subtask hierarchy, each subtask has: id, description, service, files_to_modify, files_to_create, patterns_from, verification block (type/command/expected), status, notes, updated_at
key_updates: Reformatted arrays to multi-line for readability
Updated subtask-1-3 status to 'completed' with timestamp and detailed notes
Updated subtask-1-4 status to 'completed' with smoke test results
Updated subtask-1-5 status to 'completed' confirming qemu entry in providers.json

patterns_discovered.details: Status changed from 'pending' to 'completed', followed by ISO timestamp (updated_at field), and comprehensive notes describing verification outcome
Each subtask has verification block with type (command/manual), command (shell syntax), and expected output. For qemu entry: 'cat .cards/providers.json | grep -q "qemu"' expecting 'found'
Plan tracks not just structure but also completion metadata; serves as both specification and progress log
Multi-line JSON array formatting applied consistently to files_to_create, files_to_modify, patterns_from, services_involved, test_types_required, and commands arrays

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Verification command uses grep -q with escaped quotes
gotchas_discovered.impact: Command searches for literal '"qemu"' string in JSON; must account for JSON quote escaping
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Grep pattern correctly escaped in verification command

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Multiple subtasks completed in single session
gotchas_discovered.impact: Subtasks 1-3, 1-4, 1-5 all marked complete with different timestamps; tracking interdependencies is critical
gotchas_discovered.resolution: Each subtask has independent verification; can progress sequentially or in groups

gotchas_discovered.gotcha: Plan document is source of truth for subtask status
gotchas_discovered.impact: Status transitions must be reflected in JSON with accurate timestamps for audit trail
gotchas_discovered.resolution: All status updates include updated_at and detailed notes

approach_outcome.summary: Verified qemu entry exists in .cards/providers.json with correct format
approach_outcome.verification_method: Command-based verification: grep pattern search + timestamp confirmation

subtasks_completed.result: Self-tests verified in qemu.nu; covers path resolution, zam paths, QEMU command construction, rate-limit detection
Smoke test passed; adapter exits code 1 with clear error about missing zam image
qemu entry confirmed in .cards/providers.json with correct format (command: adapters/qemu.nu, rate_limit_exit: 75)

approach_outcome.artifacts: Updated implementation_plan.json with completion status and timestamps

recommendations.recommendation: Proceed with subtask-1-6: Create adapters/README.md documenting VM architecture
recommendations.rationale: Three verification subtasks completed; documentation subtask is next logical step

recommendations.recommendation: Automate timestamp injection when marking subtasks complete
recommendations.rationale: Manual timestamp updates are error-prone; ISO format timestamp should be injected programmatically

recommendations.recommendation: Consider adding dependency tracking between subtasks
recommendations.rationale: Current plan structure supports sequential execution; explicit dependencies would prevent out-of-order completion

recommendations.recommendation: Document providers.json entry format requirements in README
recommendations.rationale: qemu adapter now verified in providers.json; document expected schema for future adapters
